arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Kiyan’s Annual New Year’s Mailbag: TAA, Xabi Alonso, Davies, Real Madrid Predictions
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani answers questions like: Which Real Madrid legend would fit best with this team if we were to bring them back?

arts.ttl: Valencia vs Real Madrid: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Real Madrid's trip to Valencia on Friday, including team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold 'makes two demands' for new Liverpool contract as Real Madrid ponder £20.7m move
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Trent Alexander-Arnold reportedly makes two demands of the Reds if he is to snub Real Madrid and sign a new deal at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid possible starting lineup against Valencia in LaLiga
arts.sum: Courtois will start in goal and in defence, Ancelotti will stick with Camavinga at left back after the solid game he had against Sevilla. The game between Valencia - Real Madrid will be played on Friday January 3 at Mestalla with kick off at 3:00 p.m. ET / 12:00 p.m. PT .

arts.ttl: Stat: Real Madrid star completely dominating La Liga midfielders since start of last season
arts.sum: A head-turning statistic, highlighting the ongoing excellence of Real Madrid star Jude Bellingham in the final third, has on Thursday come to the fore online. This comes as the Englishman’s…

arts.ttl: Details: Real Madrid’s right-back plan if they don’t sign Trent Alexander-Arnold in January
arts.sum: A fresh insight into the plans of the coaching staff at La Liga giants Real Madrid for the right-back spot in the club’s squad has on Thursday been provided. The…

arts.ttl: Why Mestalla may lie empty for first 19 minutes of Valencia-Real Madrid
arts.sum: For many years now, many Valencia fans have slowly become disillusioned with how the club has been run since Singapore based businessman Peter Lim took control over a decade ago. Friday’s game also marks a debut on the Mestalla bench for new Valencia boss Carlos Corberán with the local born coach ushered in to replace Ruben Baraja who was relieved from his role with the team languishing in the drop zone.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid To Make Another Bid For Trent Alexander-Arnold — Report
arts.sum: With Carlo Ancelotti’s side facing defensive shortages, particularly in the right-back position due to Dani Carvajal’s injury, Madrid are reportedly preparing a second bid for Alexander-Arnold, valued at up to £20 million, according a report by Paul Joyce in The TImes. However, Liverpool have made it clear they are not willing to part ways with their vice-captain, especially in the midst of a fierce Premier League title race under manager Arne Slot.

arts.ttl: Team News: Valencia vs. Real Madrid injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Friday's La Liga clash between Valencia and Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Begins Election Process for Club Presidency in 2025
arts.sum: “The president of Real Madrid, Florentino Pérez, calls the meeting of the club’s Board of Directors on January 7, 2025, at 5:30 p.m., in order to begin the election process for the president and Board of Directors for the next four years.” Florentino Pérez Calls for Early Elections, Set to Seek Another Term as Real Madrid President in 2025
